title: Write ferrum_extlib_fuzz.md
description: CCSP lib_ccsp_fuzz: fuzzing framework and targets for all parsers/decoders. Ferrum stdlib has @property_test but not a dedicated fuzzing infrastructure. Design extlib module: LibFuzzer and AFL target harness, corpus management, crash triage, OSS-Fuzz integration, fuzz targets for: ASN.1, cert, JSON, TOML, DNS response, TLS record/handshake, regex pattern+match, AEAD decrypt, CBOR, HTTP request/response.
